summary: A talking-head video of Malachi Reid, an inaugural AstraZeneca apprentice, filmed in front of the U.S. Capitol describing hands-on apprenticeship and the traditional model, closing on a DOL 'Apprenticeship USA' end card. It is a subtitled interview with no music track.
notable_text: I am one of the inaugural U.S. [apprentices]; APPRENTICESHIP USA; Department of Labor
